zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Scott於1457年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾利時，她的父親William John Scott34歲，母親Agnes Beaufitz30歲。她於1463年之前與Robert Wylie在英國英格蘭賀特福爾利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1552年在她的家鄉享年95歲。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Scott was born in 1457, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William John Scott, was 34 and her mother, Agnes Beaufitz, was 30. She married Robert Wylie before 1463, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1552, in her hometown, at the age of 95.

Elle a épousé Robert Wylie avant 1463, à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1552, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 95 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Scottが1457年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーで生まれた時，父William John Scottは34歳，母Agnes Beaufitzは30歳であった。1463年以前にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーでRobert Wylieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1552年に故郷で95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Scott(이)가 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William John Scott(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Beaufitz(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1463년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 Robert Wylie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1552년 그녀의 고향에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Scott родилась в 1457 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William John Scott было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Beaufitz, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Wylie перед 1463 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1552 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 95 лет.
